meaning: adj.中心的,中央的,重要的,主要的,中枢的,走中间道路的n.<美>电话总机
examples: The house has gas-fired central heating.
He kept turning the central heating down.
I am thinking of installing central heating.
Third, the central government is borrowing far more than it contemplated just a few months ago.
From Monday the entire BBC news operation will be based at Broadcasting House in central London.
